---
title: "Joanna Dorothea Dyke Harper"
---

## Joanna Dorothea Dyke Harper

**Dates:** (1843/4-1917)

**Maiden name:** (Acland Troyte)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

She was a Gosling as ‘Albatross’ and left in 1863.  Daughter of Arthur Henry Dyke Acland Troyte (born Acland, 1811-1857) and Frances Williams (d. 1856), she married (1864) Leonard Harper, son of the Rt. Rev. Henry John Chitty Harper (1804-1893), first Bishop of Christchurch, New Zealand.  She had a double wedding with her sister Mary who married the Rev. Walter Hook [1851 census, PB 1948 Acland, LG 1952 Harper]

### Letters

- Letter from June 27th 1862

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
